creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Please ask these general support questions on the Questions mailing list 
FIRST before submitting a PR. If there is ground for a PR please come 
back to me so that I can reopen the ticket and add the information you 
supplied. Thanks for Using FreeBSD!! We appriciate the effort that you 
want to improve our product. Please checkout 
http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/freebsd-questions for the 
mailinglist I referred to.
